# services.ergochat

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ergochat`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ergochat.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to configuration file. Setting this will skip any configuration done via `settings` |
| `services.ergochat.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ergo IRC daemon. |
| `services.ergochat.openFilesLimit` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of open files. Limits the clients and server connections. |
| `services.ergochat.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Ergo IRC daemon configuration file. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ergochat/ergo/master/default.yaml |
